title: Warm up
content: The slide depicts three driving scenarios in Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou. Each scenario is illustrated with an image, showing various activities: a view of urban infrastructure, reading, and technology use. These represent the essence and characteristics of each city.

title: AN EVOLVING NATION
content: The slide presents a thematic overview titled 'A Ride Through China,' suggesting a journey through different cities. It features images of taxis and iconic landmarks from various Chinese cities.
key_claims: Focus on taxis and urban landscapes

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: This slide introduces the objective of investigating and researching city features. The focus is on local features, development strategies, and their outcomes, aiming to highlight the positive impact.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: The slide connects three cities—Beijing, Chongqing, Hangzhou—to specific development strategies. It highlights Beijing's integration of technology and tradition, Chongqing's sustainable urban development, and Hangzhou's focus on tourism and economic growth.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers…
content: This slide discusses development strategies observed by taxi drivers in different cities. It emphasizes Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou's unique approaches to urban development, balancing local features to promote growth.
